text_jp:
奇妙な装置だ
大きなガスボンベのように見えるが…{END}
text_en:
It is a strange device.
It looks like a large gas cylinder…{END}

text_jp: 何かの装置のようだが…{END}
text_en: It seems to be some kind of device…{END}

text_jp: 操作の必要は無さそうだ{END}
text_en: There seems to be no need to operate it.{END}

text_jp: この部屋のコントロール装置だろうか…{END}
たくさんのガスボンベが置かれている{END}
text_en: Many gas cylinders are placed here.{END}

text_jp: 特に役立つものは無さそうだ{END}
